title: Connected Glasses
description: This texture pack connects the textures of the glass, so that it is not noticeable that it is a different block.
body:
# CONNECTED GLASSES
## ENGLISH

This texture pack connects the textures of the glass, so that it is not noticeable that it is a different block.
Connects all textures of all types of glass.



By @d_de_diego_d

## ESPAÑOL

Este texture pack conecta las texturas del vidrio, para que no se note que es otro bloque diferente.
Conecta todas las texturas de todo tipo de vidrios



By @d_de_diego_d
